explanation: The user specifies not to use cup_0 and requests to pick up another cup. I first place the currently held cup_0 on the countertop to free it. Then, I pick up a new cup, cup_1, and perform all the remaining steps from the old plan using cup_1 instead of cup_0. This includes placing it on the coffeemachine, toggling it on and off, and finally returning it to the countertop.
